title: Workshop: Publish a Browser-Support Field Guide
summary: Workshop: Publish a Browser-Support Field Guide retrieves prior HTML skills in an original browser support guide build scenario and requires source, parsed-structure, keyboard, and content evidence.
objectives: Apply semantic landmarks, semantic heading outline in unfamiliar content.
Produce or audit a real browser support guide build artifact without appearance-only reasoning.
Keep earlier document requirements active while verifying native behavior and valid relationships.

starterFiles.html: <!-- Continue the Heat Relief Network artifact here. -->

steps.instruction: Checkpoint 1: Create the page banner in the existing artifact and rerun every accumulated check. Scenario: browser support guide build.
steps.why: Workshop: Publish a Browser-Support Field Guide keeps meaning testable instead of depending on appearance. This is checkpoint 1 in browser support guide build.

content.title: Semantic build increment 1
content.text: Edit the current browser support guide build artifact, preserve earlier checks, and verify source plus browser behavior.
